allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: CoachMentor - AI-Powered Grassroots Football Coaching

Features:
- AI session generator aligned to FA coaching standards
- Session evaluator with UEFA C/B/A criteria
- 24/7 AI mentor chat
- Session library with 26+ curated plans \(including England Football\)
- Pitch planner tool
- Match day companion
- Video library
- Assessment prep resources
- 7-day free trial with £7.99/mo subscription \(Stripe integration\)

Built on FA frameworks: 4 Corner Model, England DNA, Plan-Do-Review
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove direct API references and route all AI through backend

- Remove all Anthropic/Claude references from frontend code
- Route image/document AI calls through backend API
- Remove fallback API key mode \(now subscription-only\)
- Clean up unused state variables and functions
- Fix billing.portal\(\) -> billing.openPortal\(\) typo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
